landing.headline: Learn Russian or prepare for school — online.
landing.intro: Personal online lessons — solo or in a small group — shaped around you and your goals. From your very first words to confident conversation, or focused school preparation. Register below and I'll reach out personally to arrange a time that suits you.
landing.qrNote: Or scan to register from your phone

about.title: About
about.placeholder: I'll introduce myself and my website here soon. 💫

student.subtitle: Fill in your details and choose a course below.

form.commentPlaceholder: Anything you'd like Samira to know? (optional)
form.successBody: Thanks for signing up. Samira will contact you soon to arrange your class.
form.incomplete: Please fill in all fields and choose a course.
form.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Teacher Dashboard
dashboard.studentHere: You're signed in as a student. Your courses are on your student dashboard.

studentArea.title: Student dashboard
studentArea.loginHint: Use the email and password Samira sent you.

studentArea.loadError: We couldn't load your courses. Please try again.
studentArea.teacherHere: You're signed in as the teacher. Your courses and registrations are on the teacher dashboard.
